/AJW/CH1:SP2Y:M:ESS:PROB 3 Y:PJ6M/CTS:140/STATES//CTORD:DEFENDANT NOT TO POSSESS ANY COMPUTER OR COMPUTER PERIPHERAL SUCH ASPRINTERS OR SCANNER WITHOUT THE WRITTEN PERMISSION OF THE PROBATION OFFICER//X:DEFENDANT MAY NOT USE COMPUTERS OUTSIDE THE WORKPLACE WITHOUT THE WRITTEN PERMISSION OF THE PROBATION OFFICER,//X:ALSO DEFENDANT MAY USE COMPUTER  AT HIS PLACE OF EMPLOYMENT IF THAT IS PART OF THE JOB AND IF SELF EMPLYED MAY NOT USE WITHOUT THE WRITTEN PERMISSION OF THE PROBATION OFFICER,/RESTO:ROBERT PRATHER AND MATHEW WONG/X:COURTSIGNED THE ORDER OF FORFEITURE OF COMPUTER EQUIPMENT,/WS/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/CCC:COUNTS 1, 2 AND 3/X:TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF SC#188069 TRANSFERREDTO SC#189892,/OBEY/ACCEP/
